name: Stupidella Horror 2
author: Poki
description: Stupidella Horror 2 is the wacky sequel where the nightmare continues with even crazier puzzles and meme-fueled scares! Click your way through cursed logic, absurd surprises, and brain-bending levels that keep you guessing at every turn. One wrong move could lead to chaos or the funniest doom yet. Ready to laugh, scream, and solve your way out? How to play Stupidella Horror 2 Click or tap to play! Who created Stupidella Horror 2 Stupidella Horror 2 is created by Stupidella. Play their other games on Poki: Stupidella 1 , Stupidella 2 , Stupidella 3 , Stupidella 4 , Stupidella Click , Stupidella Horror , Troll Toilet Quest 1 and Troll Toilet Quest 2 ! How can I play Stupidella Horror 2 for free? You can play Stupidella Horror 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Stupidella Horror 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Stupidella Horror 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
